content.body:
I had a first stab at some Annex K wording to allow "Early-adoption or experimental" cryptographic mechanism:

https://docs.google.com/document/d/17i2bKuERhNNVDCeSv-o0zTjS8PUeBenxdb9ipj4BGn0/edit?tab=t.s2hs6z6rnbe9#bookmark=id.iw6cnm4hauq5

Note that I'm still waiting for feedback from the actual cryptographers on the team, and the first clause might be a little restrictive, but wanted to see if you think something like this might fly.
